name: Shrimp Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the tomato soup to boiling.
2. Dissolve the gelatin in cold water and add it to the boiling soup.
3. Mix together the cream cheese and mayonnaise, then add this mixture to the soup.
4. Beat everything with a rotary mixer until well combined.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (shrimp, onions, celery, and green pepper) to the bowl and stir gently.
6. Pour the mixture into a greased mold.
7. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
8. To unmold, run a knife around the edges of the mold to loosen it, then turn the mold upside down onto a plate.
9. Unmold the shrimp onto plates lined with crackers.
10. Serve and enjoy!
